strategy.name: Donchian Momentum Breakout (3m)
sources: Claude — designed to be uncorrelated with the 5m VWAP+RSI pullback bot
strategy.description: Momentum breakout strategy. Wait for price to break a 20-bar range, confirm with EMA(50) trend + slope, require ATR(14) to be expanding, and reject anything more than 1.5% away from EMA(50). Trades the 'move' instead of the 'pullback' — different regime from the 5m bot, so drawdowns should be uncorrelated.

indicators.donchian_20: Entry trigger. Highest high / lowest low of the PRIOR 20 bars (current bar excluded). Close above upper = long breakout. Close below lower = short breakout.
indicators.ema_50: Trend filter. Price must be on the right side AND the EMA must be sloping our way (current EMA vs 3 bars ago). 50-period on 3m ≈ 2.5 hours of smoothing.
indicators.atr_14: Volatility filter. ATR(14) must exceed SMA(ATR, 20) — i.e. the market is 'waking up'. Avoids fakeouts in dead, flat ranges where breakouts reverse immediately.

long: Close above 20-bar high — upside breakout confirmed
EMA(50) rising vs 3 bars ago — slope agrees with breakout
ATR(14) > SMA(ATR, 20) — volatility is expanding, not a dead-market fakeout
Price within 1.5% of EMA(50) — don't chase a parabolic move
short: Close below 20-bar low — downside breakout confirmed
EMA(50) falling vs 3 bars ago — slope agrees with breakout
Price within 1.5% of EMA(50) — don't chase a parabolic move

exit_rules: Hard stop: 0.3% below entry for longs, 0.3% above entry for shorts (SL_PCT in .env)
Take profit: 1.05% target (TP_PCT in .env) — chosen so that AFTER round-trip fees (0.15%) the true R:R is 2:1
No momentum-based early exit — breakouts need room to run. Let TP/SL do the work.
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade (RISK_PER_TRADE_PCT in .env)
Position sizing is RISK-BASED: notional = (portfolio × risk%) / stopLoss%. Margin = notional / leverage.
Example: $500 portfolio × 1% risk / 0.3% SL = $1,666.67 notional. At 10x leverage → $166.67 margin required.
Leverage via Binance Spot Margin (LEVERAGE in .env, default 10x isolated). Futures not required/available in all regions.
Max margin per trade capped by MAX_TRADE_SIZE_USD (acts as a hard ceiling — if risk formula would exceed it, position size scales down and actual $ risk drops proportionally).
Max trades per day capped by MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY in .env
Daily loss circuit breaker: bot halts trading for the UTC day if cumulative P&L ≤ -MAX_DAILY_LOSS_USD
Do not trade if price is more than 1.5% away from EMA(50) — overextended / late to the move
Paper trade first — breakout strategies need validation on YOUR asset before going live

fees_and_costs.taker_fee: 0.075% per fill with BNB discount (0.1% without). Round-trip ≈ 0.15% of notional per trade.
fees_and_costs.fee_impact: TP 1.05% − 0.15% fees = 0.90% net. SL 0.30% + 0.15% fees = 0.45% net. True R:R after fees = 2:1. Break-even win rate ~33%.
fees_and_costs.borrow_interest: HOURLY_BORROW_PCT in .env, default 0.0008%/hr (~7% APY) on borrowed portion. Negligible for sub-hour scalps (<$0.01 per trade).

notes: Breakout strategy — designed for 3m timeframe. Most candles produce NO signal (this is expected and correct — breakouts are rare events). Paired with the 5m pullback bot to trade two uncorrelated regimes simultaneously. Do not apply to higher timeframes without re-tuning Donchian period and EMA length.
